iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 8% (up). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: No nuclear escalation signals. Nuclear doctrine unchanged per Iran FM. DNI/Ratcliffe facing House hearing today on pre-war threat assessments. Energy war escalating but nuclear threshold not crossed. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Brent at $118 (+10%). UK military planners sent to CENTCOM Tampa for Hormuz reopening plans. Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of allied energy infrastructure. Biden/EU's Macron calls escalation 'reckless'. 4th Palestinian killed in West Bank strike (pregnant woman). Iran-Hezbollah fire missiles at Israel today (Jerusalem, north). Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Brent crude surges to $118 (+10%), European gas prices +30%
latest_news.text: Brent jumps to $118/barrel. European natural gas +30%. Nikkei -3%, STOXX 600, FTSE, DAX all -2%+. Germany warns of 'massive slump'.

latest_news.headline: UK military planners sent to CENTCOM Tampa for Strait of Hormuz reopening plans
latest_news.text: British military planners deployed to MacDill AFB to help draw up plans to reopen Hormuz. Trump had sharply criticized UK for not being 'enthusiastically' involved.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliatory strikes on 'US interest' energy facilities, threatens 'complete destruction'
latest_news.text: Iran's Zolfaghari: retaliatory strikes will continue until 'complete destruction' of US/allied energy infrastructure if Iran's energy sites targeted again.

latest_news.headline: 4th Palestinian killed in West Bank Iranian missile strike — pregnant woman dies
latest_news.text: Pregnant woman wounded in Wednesday's West Bank missile strike dies, bringing death toll to 4. PA blames Israeli interceptor; Israel blames Iranian missile.

latest_news.headline: Iran-Hezbollah fire multiple missiles at Israel — Jerusalem and north forced to shelter
latest_news.text: Multiple missiles and rockets from Iran and Hezbollah hit Israel Thursday, forcing shelter orders in Jerusalem and northern communities. Most intercepted; minor damage in Tel Aviv area.

latest_news.headline: Trump waives Jones Act for 60 days to ease fuel delivery crisis
latest_news.text: Trump admin temporarily allows foreign-flagged vessels to carry fuel/fertilizer between US ports. Rare Jones Act waiver. 'Operation Epic Fury' disrupting global trade.

latest_news.headline: UK military planners at CENTCOM Tampa — Britain joins Hormuz reopening effort
latest_news.text: British military planners deployed to MacDill AFB, Tampa. Starmer previously said de-escalation was best approach; Trump demanded UK 'be involved enthusiastically'.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Israel strikes central Beirut (Bashoura, 15-story building destroyed), kills Hezbollah Al-Manar TV political programs director Mohammad Shari. Litani River bridges struck (2 destroyed). 20+ killed across Lebanon Wednesday. 912+ killed since last Monday (100+ children). Israeli ground ops expanding south of Zahrani. UN rights office says attacks may amount to war crimes. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel demolishes 15-story building in central Beirut, 6+ killed in city strikes
latest_news.text: Israeli strikes destroy 15-story building in Bashoura, central Beirut. Hezbollah stored cash there per IDF. 6+ killed, dozens wounded across Lebanon overnight.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah Al-Manar TV political director killed in central Beirut strike
latest_news.text: Mohammad Shari, director of political programs at Hezbollah-affiliated Al-Manar, killed with his wife in Israeli strike on Zuqaq al-Blat area. Children and grandchildren wounded.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, cutting southern Lebanon evacuation routes
latest_news.text: IDF strikes bridges across Litani River linking south Lebanon to north. Defense Minister Katz confirms. IDF says bridges used to transfer Hezbollah fighters/weapons. Evacuation routes cut.

latest_news.headline: 912+ killed in Lebanon since last Monday (100+ children) — UN says attacks may be war crimes
latest_news.text: Lebanon health ministry: 912+ killed since renewed attacks last Monday. 100+ children among dead. UN rights office says Israeli attacks 'may amount to war crimes'. Paramedic killed in Sidon strike.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik (now 2 systems at Incirlik + 1 at Kürecik radar). 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began (Mar 4, 9, 13). Third missile reportedly targeted Incirlik vicinity. Turkey emerging as key NATO air defense hub against Iran. Coupling from Iran conventional maintains elevated score. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: No new signals. Stable. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Arms supply to Iran ongoing. Oil price surge boosts Russian revenue. No direct ME intervention. Ukraine peace talks paused. Putin-Trump call yielded no breakthrough. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: China mediating diplomatically. No PLA activity. Status quo maintained. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Extended quiet. No signals. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 46% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Peace talks formally paused due to Iran war. Oil price surge continues to boost Russian revenue. No frontline changes. Ukraine drone experts deployed to Gulf states per earlier reports. Lavrov rejects any settlement without full territorial concessions. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (down). Day 20 auto - Hour 12 update: Eid ceasefire active (Mar 18-23). No fighting reported during ceasefire window. Operations expected to resume with 'renewed intensity' after Eid. No ceasefire path beyond temporary truce. Updated 2026-03-19T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding — no fighting during Mar 18-23 window
latest_news.text: Eid al-Fitr ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. Both sides observing temporary truce. No reports of border clashes. Post-Eid resumption of hostilities expected.

top_signals: Day 20 of Iran war — Brent at $118 (+10%), European gas +30%
UK military planners deploy to CENTCOM Tampa for Strait of Hormuz reopening
Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of all US/allied energy infrastructure
Israel demolishes central Beirut building, kills Hezbollah TV director
NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik — 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey
4th Palestinian killed in West Bank strike (pregnant woman dies)
912+ killed in Lebanon since last Monday, UN says attacks may be war crimes
Iran-Hezbollah fire missiles at Israel — Jerusalem forced to shelter
Trump waives Jones Act for 60 days to ease US fuel crisis

new: iran_conventional: uk_hormuz_coalition (weight 3) — UK military planners sent to CENTCOM Tampa for Hormuz reopening plans
iran_conventional: oil_above_120 confirmed active — Brent at $118, some benchmarks crossed $120
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: UK joins Hormuz planning — coalition forming slowly. Energy infrastructure targeting cycle deepening (Kuwait, Saudi, UAE, Qatar all hit). Iran threatens complete destruction if strikes continue. Trump waives Jones Act. 4th Palestinian killed. No ceasefire signals in any theater. Hegseth/Caine press conference scheduled 13:00 UTC. DNI Gabbard/Ratcliffe face House hearing today. Brent at $118, approaching $120. Watch: Iran nuclear doctrine — if rhetoric shifts from 'no change' to 'reconsidering', nuclear tracker jumps.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait refineries hit by drone strikes — 2 state-owned facilities on fire
latest_news.text: Drone attacks cause fires at two state-owned refineries in Kuwait. First confirmed drone strikes on Kuwaiti energy infrastructure this war cycle.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude at $118.74 — oil and gas prices surging across global markets
latest_news.text: Brent crude jumps nearly 10% to $118.74. Japan gas prices hit record high. UK wholesale gas at 3-year high. European markets down 1.5-2%+. Nikkei down 3%.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of US/allied energy infrastructure if strikes continue
latest_news.text: Iran's joint military command warns: 'next attacks on your energy infrastructure will be met with complete destruction.' Retaliation cycle deepening.

latest_news.headline: 3 Palestinians killed in West Bank by Iranian missile — first WB fatalities of war
latest_news.text: Missile strikes beauty parlor in makeshift West Bank location. Israeli military says Iranian origin; Palestinian officials blame errant Israeli interceptor. First fatal attack on Palestinians in occupied territories since war began.

latest_news.headline: Arab and Muslim foreign ministers condemn Iranian strikes in joint Riyadh statement
latest_news.text: Joint statement condemns 'deliberate' Iranian attacks on 'oil facilities, desalination plants, airports, residential buildings, and diplomatic premises.' Diplomatic isolation of Iran deepening.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 11:04 UTC) — (1) Iran retaliatory strikes expand to Kuwait (refinery fires) and Saudi/UAE energy infrastructure; (2) Brent at $118.74, nearing $120 — global energy crisis deepening; (3) Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of all regional energy infrastructure; (4) First Palestinian fatalities in West Bank from Iranian missiles; (5) Arab/Muslim FMs jointly condemn Iran in Riyadh — diplomatic isolation; (6) No ceasefire signals in any active theater; (7) Japan PM arrives in Washington amid record gas prices.
